title: adicea angulata
intro: Adicea angulata, also known as the Anglewing or Angle-leaved Adicea, is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adicea angulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Adicea angulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
